reviews.reviewer: Claude (Cowork) — SA formula audit + outgoing local-change review 2026-07-03
reviews.outcome: Approved. Three change sets applied to SATrackerPage.tsx: (1) Added client-side 📅 Range: date fine-filter matching /technician. (2) Fixed SA earnings formula — calculateSAIncome now divides by 1.18 before applying SA%; fixes stats-bar tile, sort key, and display sub-label. (3) Applied per-SA EV/PV rate differentiation — all income call sites (saCards, dayCards, JC detail rows, stats tile, yesterday report) now look up each SA's fuel_type from employee_master and apply evSharePercent for EV SAs, saSharePercent for PV; both rates controlled by existing Earnings % settings. buildSAWAText updated to show PV/EV rates. Stats tile and sub-label updated to show both percentages. No new routes, module keys, DB tables, or RBAC changes. No mobile surface affected. CURRENT_STATE.md unchanged. TypeScript: tsc --noEmit clean.

health_findings_routed.disposition: No repository update needed — pre-existing advisory false positive documented in docs/shared/evidence/WAVE_1_STUB_CLEANUP_REPORT_2026-06-30.md

routing_actions.reason: Change adds a UI filter only; no new routes, module keys, or DB tables introduced. CURRENT_STATE.md has no filter-level detail for any page — nothing to update.
DOCS_IMPACT_MATRIX.md application_code obligation: CHANGE_LOG.md entry required for all application code changes.
